Apworld.description:
-added health pips that restore your health when recieved

fixed apworld not appearing do to names being re formated on github
Apworld.title: Version 0.1.1 hotfix

Bowser-Bombs.description:
Changes:
-RR Trap removed temporarily due to bugs
-LLL added to Enemysanity
-Bombs in the bowser fights have now been randomized


Known Bugs
Previous issues still unresolved
Bowser-Bombs.title: Version 0.1.5

Bowser-Soul-Update.description:
-Added CCM to Enemysanity
-Removed the "-2" checks from all but 100 coins in CCM
-Added Bowser Souls. Bowser Will no longer spawn until you receive the respective AP Item
-Fixed Reported Logic Bug regarding Releasing Chain Chomp


- Potentially more logic bugs exist requires further testing
- Extra King bob-omb checks still not fixed
- patches still not fixed
Bowser-Soul-Update.title: Version 0.1.4

Climbsanity.description:
-finished most of signsanity (note there are still some not sending checks properly, will be fixed soon)
-added climbsanity to all trees/poles/pillars in: Castle Grounfs, Courtyard, BOB, WF, JRB, CCM, HMC, LLL, SSL, BITFS, DDD, WDW and SL, the rest will come soon
Climbsanity.title: Version 0.2.3

Colorful-Update.description:
Changes:
-Added the Boos in BBH to enemysanity (other enemies aare still a W.I.P
-Mario's Colours and Star Colours now randomize based on the AP Seed

Known bugs
-all previously mentioned bugs
Colorful-Update.title: Version 0.1.6

Filler.description:
Changes:

Re-wrote ho filler is generated from based on Max Star Count to be based on remaining locations after progression items have been placed
Filler.title: Version 0.1.5 Hotfix

Hotfix.description: -Fixed Logic Bug in HMC regarding Watch for rolling rocks-2
Hotfix.title: Version 0.1.3 Hotfix

Its-a-Sign.description:
- Added Some signsanity. Signs in the castle, on the castle grounds, in the castle courtyard, BoB, WF, JRB, CCM, and BBH have been added as locations. Adding roughly 50 more locations

-A few new colour randimizations
Its-a-Sign.title: Version 0.2.1

More-Boo.description:
Changes Made:
-Re-wrote logic completely to fix location accessibility issues
-added piranha plants to colour randomizer
-added Courtyard Boos to enemysanity

Known bugs
-patches
-RR trap
More-Boo.title: Version 0.1.8

More-colours.description:
Changes Made:
-Further updated logic, fixes many logic holes
- added multiple new stuff to the colour randomization


Known Bugs:
-RR Trap
-Dying from jumping into water without swim then being pushed onto land will cause mario not to die and the camera to be locked in place
-patches
More-colours.title: Version 0.2.0

Not-so-healthy.description:
Changes Made:
- Added a progressive help system. You start at 3 health, and for each progressive max health you recieve the max goes up by one until you reach 8 max health
- Removed the health pip filler items, as it conflicted with the progressive max health system, they may return in the future.

Known Bugs:
- RR Trap
- patches
- Entering secret aquarium as your first stage after launching the game results in a crash, entering any other course before secret aquarium will prevent this crash from happening
Not-so-healthy.title: Version 0.1.10

Poor-Toad.description:
Changes:
-Logic updates
-Randomized Goomba's and Toad's Colours
-Toad will never be the same
-Fixed an issue where apworld wasn't sending seed data for the colour Rando

Known Bugs:
-Patches still not working
-RR Trap still "Boxes people" when triggered in rainbow ride
-Toad (will not be fixed)
Poor-Toad.title: Version 0.1.7

Toxic-Waters.description:
-Fixed an issue that caused painting items to unlock the wrong paintings

-Updated logic flaws regarding the new moves
Toxic-Waters.title: Version 0.1.9 Hotfix

more-signs.description:
-Realized i missed CCM, BBH and PSS in the apworld for signsanitywill be fixed soon
-Added BITDW, LLL, HMC, COTMC, SSL, DDD, WDW, and SL to signsanity raising the location count to 400
-added a Yaml Option to choose how many Progressive Keys are in the pool between 2-4
-added signs to colour rando
more-signs.title: Version 0.2.2

newapworld.description:
Rebuild your launcher


-added Enemysanity to Bob-omb battlefield
-added Toadsanity
-added checks for:
 -Releasing Chain Chomp
 -Initiating the King Bob-omb Fight
 -Throwing King Bob-omb of the Mountain
 -Beating King Bob-omb

-added trap type:
 -Rainbow Ride Trap
Transports player to rainbow ride where they cannot escape until either 6 minutes run out, or you collect a star that spawns in a random location throughout the stage
newapworld.title: Version 0.1.2

nextone.description:
-added Whomps fortress to enemysanity
-added Toad Souls that lock toadsanity checks until the respective toad sul is sent from AP
-Added a new Useful item: Koopa Shell that spawns a koopa shell in front of mario


Known Bugs
-Patches still not working right
-King bob-omb's extra checks from last update not sending right, removed locations for now
-Toads have been said to be quite rude when they don't have a soul
nextone.title: Version 0.1.3
